creator: meetshamsher@gmail.com
text:
I have updated the ntpv4 using port https://www.freshports.org/net/ntp/
seeing below issues as "no server suitable for synchronization found" with ntpdate (-d/-u) from 0.freebsd.pool.ntp.org


ntpdate -d 0.freebsd.pool.ntp.org
 9 Apr 05:37:14 ntpdate[95778]: ntpdate 4.2.8p15@1.3728-o Thu Feb 18 07:28:03 UTC 2021 (1)
transmit(173.255.215.209)
transmit(85.27.231.43)
transmit(72.30.35.88)
transmit(200.89.75.198)
transmit(173.255.215.209)
transmit(85.27.231.43)
transmit(72.30.35.88)
transmit(200.89.75.198)
transmit(173.255.215.209)
transmit(85.27.231.43)
transmit(72.30.35.88)
transmit(200.89.75.198)
transmit(173.255.215.209)
transmit(85.27.231.43)
transmit(72.30.35.88)
transmit(200.89.75.198)
173.255.215.209: Server dropped: no data
85.27.231.43: Server dropped: no data
72.30.35.88: Server dropped: no data
200.89.75.198: Server dropped: no data

 9 Apr 05:37:22 ntpdate[95778]: no server suitable for synchronization found

Also tried 
ntpdate -u 0.freebsd.pool.ntp.org
 9 Apr 05:36:04 ntpdate[68844]: no server suitable for synchronization found

ping 0.freebsd.pool.ntp.org
PING 0.freebsd.pool.ntp.org (173.255.215.209): 56 data bytes
64 bytes from 173.255.215.209: icmp_seq=0 ttl=42 time=253.551 ms
64 bytes from 173.255.215.209: icmp_seq=1 ttl=42 time=253.642 ms
64 bytes from 173.255.215.209: icmp_seq=2 ttl=42 time=253.674 ms
